description: Step 1/5: Scan all installed Python packages and save to report file
command_preview:
import subprocess, json, os

print('=== STEP 1/5: Python Packages Scan ===')
print()

# Get pip list as JSON
result = subprocess.run(['pip', 'list', '--format=json'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
packages = json.loads(result.stdout)

print('Total packages found:', len(packages))
print()
print('Top packages:')
for pkg in sorted(packages, key=lambda x: x['name'])[:30]:
    print('  ', pkg['name'].ljust(30), pkg['version'])

if len(packages) > 30:
    print('  ... and', len(packages)
